startUrls.title: Vacasa Unit URLs
startUrls.description: List of Vacasa rental unit URLs to scrape. Each URL should be a direct link to a Vacasa unit page (e.g., https://www.vacasa.com/unit/12345).

googleMapsApiKey.title: Google Maps API Key (Optional)
googleMapsApiKey.description: Optional Google Maps Geocoding API key for converting coordinates to street addresses.
